summary: Script is well-crafted with proper error handling, type hints, and clear design. However, CRITICAL: workflow uses `actions/checkout@v4` (mutable tag) instead of a pinned commit SHA—direct violation of stated YAML best practices. Otherwise: Python follows good patterns (custom exceptions, validation, proper exit codes). Workflow structure is sound but depends on external fixture setup (not visible) and lacks visibility into test orchestration. Glob-to-regex logic (lines 65-102) is necessarily complex. Action pinning issue alone prevents shipping.
